subject: Cara Liss — a scientist figure in a white lab coat working among rocky fossil-laden surroundings
description: A humanoid figure wearing a white lab coat or scientist outfit stands in a rocky, cave-like or excavation environment. The background suggests stone walls and fossil-bearing rock. The figure has dark hair and appears to be examining or working with something, possibly a fossil fragment or device held in hand. The color palette is warm earthy tones — browns, oranges, and stone greys — with the white coat as the primary contrast element. The setting reads as a paleontological dig site or laboratory carved from rock.
